_notes: RP2040 SRAM is 264KB (six banks). Onboard 2MB QSPI flash. GPIO 23/24/29 reserved for board functions (SMPS PS, VBUS sense, VSYS sense). GPIO25 drives onboard LED. Every GPIO 0-22 + 26-28 is PWM- and interrupt-capable. Three ADC channels (GP26/27/28), plus internal AIN3 for VSYS/2 read.
name: Raspberry Pi Pico (RP2040)
special: BOOTSEL button (held during reset for USB mass-storage flashing)
PIO state machines (2 banks of 4) for custom protocols
